uploadPrompt: Upload data to see margin breakdown
askAskBizPrompt: Show me a revenue and margin breakdown for my business
modalSubtitle: Click any metric to drill down · {dataSource}
detailFooterPos: Based on {count} transactions in the last 30 days.
detailFooterHealth: Index-relative to health score signals. Connect accounting for exact values.
drillStockHoldingNote: Inventory holding cost affects your margins. A stock-to-revenue ratio above 50% may indicate overstocking.
drillOperatingNote: Operating expenses include rent, utilities, staff costs and other overhead. Connect your accounting data for exact figures.
drillNetMarginNote: Your net margin is {margin}% based on POS data. This reflects product margins only; connect accounting for full P&L.
drillPromptRevenue: What are my revenue trends, top revenue sources, and how can I increase sales?
drillPromptCogs: Break down my cost of goods sold — which products have the highest cost ratio?
drillPromptGrossProfit: Analyse my gross profit margins — which products are most and least profitable?
drillPromptOperating: What are my operating expenses and how can I reduce overhead costs?
drillPromptStockCost: Show me my inventory holding costs, slow-moving stock, and dead stock items
drillPromptNetMargin: Give me a full net margin analysis with recommendations to improve profitability
